name: @symbiosis-lab/moss-plugin-comment
description: Comment section plugin for moss - renders stored comments and accepts new ones

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run bundle && npm run copy-assets
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run copy-assets && concurrently "npm run bundle -- --watch" "npm run watch-assets"
scripts.copy-assets: cp assets/* dist/ && cp browser/moss-comments.css dist/

author: Symbiosis Lab
